titleStmt.title: SII 41.6: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 6. (A.R. No. 6 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This records the gift of 192 sheep, by Milāḍuḍaiyān Rāman Mummuḍisōlan alias Rājendrasōla-Milāḍuḍaiyān, for burning two perpetual lamps to the deity Tiruvīrattānamuḍaiya-mahādēva, at Tirukkōvalūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-valanāḍu alias Milāḍu. Also records the gift of 2 lamps each weighing 872 palams by the weighing scale veḷḷikkōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyaṟpāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic
celviyum tiyallūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai
nāṭun tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭarvaṉa vāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷip pākkai
yum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattarai cartamuṭiyum
Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta
cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉ Āramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum
Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palar pu
kaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelai
t tolperuṅkāvalp palpaḻantivuñ ceruviṟci
ṉavil Irupattoru kāl Araicukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcā
nti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅko
ṭu paḻimiku muyaṅkiil mutukiṭṭoḷitta caraciṅkaRead ‘cayaciṅka’ṉ Aḷapperumpukaḻoṭu
m piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikulap perumalaikaḷu
māpperutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakeśaripanmarāna śrīrājecandracoḻade
vaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭu kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattut tiruk
kovalūr tiruviraṭṭāṉa muṭaiya mahādevaṟkku milāṭuṭaiyān Irāmaṉ mummuṭi coḻa
ṉāṉa rājentiracoḻa milāṭuṭaiyān vaitta tirunontāviḷakku Iraṇṭuk
ku vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu nūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟu Iraṇṭu Ittirunontāviḷakku
niṉṟeriya Ivvūr veḷḷikkolāl karuvuṭpaṭa viḷakku Oṉṟu niṟai Eṇṇūṟṟu
eḻupattirupalam Ivai cantirādittavaṟ Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
